ACTUAL_QUERY: INSERT INTO   `edna-data-pr-cah.D2_FACT_MED_AIMS_KPI_PC.LABOR_AIMS_KRONOS_EVENT_LOG_MED_TEMP` SELECT   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   SOURCE,   DIVISION,   RECORD_UPDATE_DTE,   USR_PERSONNELNR,   USR_PERSONNELNAME,   DAY,   GRPBY_LVL,   EVL_IDENT,   LOCATION,   OPS_REGION,   SHIFT,   '' AS BLC_CODE,   UPPER(IDM_UID) IDM_UID,   MIN(CAST(BEG_TIME_AIMS AS STRING)) AS BEG_TIME_AIMS,   MAX(CAST(END_TIME_AIMS AS STRING)) AS END_TIME_AIMS,   SUM( EVL_IDENT_SEC) AS TOTAL_SEC,   SUM( EVL_IDENT_SEC/60) AS TOTAL_MIN,   SUM( EVL_IDENT_SEC/60/60) AS TOTAL_HRS,   CASE     WHEN EVL_IDENT='UNKNOWN_TIME' AND SUM( EVL_IDENT_SEC) <=120 THEN LAG( TRIM(EVL_IDENT)) OVER (PARTITION BY DIVISION, USR_PERSONNELNR, DAY ORDER BY MIN (CAST(BEG_TIME_AIMS AS STRING)) ASC )     WHEN EVL_IDENT LIKE'KRONOS%'   AND SOURCE='AIMS' THEN 'UNKNOWN_TIME'     ELSE EVL_IDENT END   EVL_IDENT_THRESHOLD,   SUM(TRANSACTION_ID) TRANSACTION_ID,   USR_TITLE,   EMPLOYEE_ID FROM   `edna-data-pr-cah.D2_FACT_MED_AIMS_KPI_PC.LABOR_AIMS_KRONOS_EVENT_LOG` el LEFT JOIN (   SELECT     DISTINCT division10,     CASE       WHEN location='Solon' THEN 'Walton Hills'       ELSE location   END     AS location,     ops_region   FROM     `edna-data-pr-cah.VI0_MED_DATALAB_COMMON_NP.WHS_LOCATIONS_CV`   UNION ALL   SELECT     'WC',     'CA239',     'RC'   UNION ALL   SELECT     'CI',     'IL002',     'Central'   UNION ALL   SELECT     'JG',     'GA077',     'RC') whs ON   el.division = whs.division10 WHERE   DIVISION=CURRENT_RUN GROUP BY SOURCE,   DIVISION,   RECORD_UPDATE_DTE,   USR_PERSONNELNR,   USR_PERSONNELNAME,   DAY,   GRPBY_LVL,   EVL_IDENT,   LOCATION,   OPS_REGION,   SHIFT,   BLC_CODE,   IDM_UID,   USR_TITLE,   EMPLOYEE_ID HAVING   SUM( EVL_IDENT_SEC/60/60) < 10 /* Activity WHERE   total time IS >10 hours should also be removed prior TO combinding DATA AS NO one should be IN one activity that long without ending   AND starting again due TO lunch   AND breaks. */ ORDER BY   BEG_TIME_AIMS ASC

INSERT INTO   `edna-data-pr-cah.D2_FACT_MED_AIMS_KPI_PC.LABOR_AIMS_WRKDAY_EVENT_LOG_MED_TEMP` SELECT   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   SOURCE,   DIVISION,   RECORD_UPDATE_DTE,   USR_PERSONNELNR,   USR_PERSONNELNAME,   DAY,   GRPBY_LVL,   EVL_IDENT,   LOCATION,   OPS_REGION,   SHIFT,   '' AS BLC_CODE,   UPPER(IDM_UID) IDM_UID,   MIN(CAST(BEG_TIME_AIMS AS STRING)) AS BEG_TIME_AIMS,   MAX(CAST(END_TIME_AIMS AS STRING)) AS END_TIME_AIMS,   SUM( EVL_IDENT_SEC) AS TOTAL_SEC,   SUM( EVL_IDENT_SEC/60) AS TOTAL_MIN,   SUM( EVL_IDENT_SEC/60/60) AS TOTAL_HRS,   CASE     WHEN EVL_IDENT='UNKNOWN_TIME' AND SUM( EVL_IDENT_SEC) <=120 THEN LAG( TRIM(EVL_IDENT)) OVER (PARTITION BY DIVISION, USR_PERSONNELNR, DAY ORDER BY MIN (CAST(BEG_TIME_AIMS AS STRING)) ASC )     WHEN EVL_IDENT LIKE'KRONOS%'   AND SOURCE='AIMS' THEN 'UNKNOWN_TIME'     ELSE EVL_IDENT END   EVL_IDENT_THRESHOLD,   SUM(TRANSACTION_ID) TRANSACTION_ID,   USR_TITLE,   EMPLOYEE_ID FROM   `edna-data-pr-cah.D2_FACT_MED_AIMS_KPI_PC.LABOR_AIMS_WRKDAY_EVENT_LOG` el LEFT JOIN (     SELECT     DISTINCT division10,     CASE       WHEN location='Solon' THEN 'Walton Hills'       ELSE location   END     AS location,     ops_region   FROM     `edna-data-pr-cah.VI0_MED_DATALAB_COMMON_NP.WHS_LOCATIONS_CV`   UNION ALL   SELECT     'WC',     'CA239',     'RC'   UNION ALL   SELECT     'CI',     'IL002',     'Central'   UNION ALL   SELECT     'JG',     'GA077',     'RC') whs ON   el.division = whs.division10 WHERE   DIVISION=CURRENT_RUN GROUP BY SOURCE,   DIVISION,   RECORD_UPDATE_DTE,   USR_PERSONNELNR,   USR_PERSONNELNAME,   DAY,   GRPBY_LVL,   EVL_IDENT,   LOCATION,   OPS_REGION,   SHIFT,   BLC_CODE,   IDM_UID,   USR_TITLE,   EMPLOYEE_ID HAVING   SUM( EVL_IDENT_SEC/60/60) < 10 /* Activity WHERE   total time IS >10 hours should also be removed prior TO combinding DATA AS NO one should be IN one activity that long without ending   AND starting again due TO lunch   AND breaks. */ ORDER BY   BEG_TIME_AIMS ASC
